name: lock-acquire on an already-held section by a different owner blocks rather than overwrites
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/locks && printf 'owner=pid-1\nacquired_at=2026-05-13T00:00:00Z\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/locks/rule_cache.lock && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/lock-acquire.sh" --section rule_cache --owner pid-2 --lock-dir .claude-tdd-pro/locks --no-wait 2>err.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -ne 0 ] && grep -q 'lock_held_by=pid-1' err.txt && echo blocked 1>&2
